title: commandNotFoundHandler: use stderr and exit code 1

comments.body: And again - CI times out after an exit 0. We need to look into this on Tuesday.

:pushpin: Commit 176e862 has been approved by `mheon`

Approved by: mheon
Pushing daa28349c8cfadc53de96a851b7d1d71de7b14e9 to master...

Actually I think we should just do 
exit(exitCode)

Since we document in at least podman run that the exit is 125.
